rationale: Diff contains only an execution result.json metadata file. No schema changes, resolver code, or tests are present to evaluate any AC item (mutation definition, idempotencyKey, duplicate handling, audit, concurrent tests).

findings.summary: No GraphQL schema change adding runRequeue mutation visible in diff
No resolver implementing atomic claim / duplicate idempotencyKey handling
No audit-event emission code for originating bead
No tests covering concurrent re-queue with same idempotencyKey
Only file changed is execution evidence metadata; actual implementation (per commit d9491735) is not part of the reviewed diff
